title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 64.450 - County parks — acquisition and maintenance
text:
64.450.  County parks — acquisition and maintenance. — County commissions in all counties in the state of Missouri may set aside five percent of the county revenue fund for the purchase of county parks and the maintenance thereof.  Titles to land purchased shall be taken in the name of the county, and each county commission is authorized to set aside a sufficient amount each year for the maintenance of said parks when purchased.
(RSMo 1939 § 15390) 
Prior revision: 1929 § 14268
